parameters.query: UPDATE influencer_suggestions SET status = 'failed', error_reason = '{{ $json._reason }}' WHERE instagram_username = '{{ $json._username }}';

INSERT INTO influencers (id, username, full_name, biography, profile_pic_url, followers_count, external_url, external_url_title, last_synced_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.influencer.id }}',
  '{{ $json.influencer.username }}',
  '{{ ($json.influencer.full_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.influencer.biography || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.influencer.profile_pic_url }}',
  {{ $json.influencer.followers_count }},
  '{{ $json.influencer.external_url }}',
  '{{ ($json.influencer.external_url_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.influencer.last_synced_at }}',
  '{{ $json.influencer.updated_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  username = EXCLUDED.username,
  full_name = EXCLUDED.full_name,
  biography = EXCLUDED.biography,
  profile_pic_url = EXCLUDED.profile_pic_url,
  followers_count = EXCLUDED.followers_count,
  external_url = EXCLUDED.external_url,
  external_url_title = EXCLUDED.external_url_title,
  last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(id), '[]'::json) as existing_ids FROM posts WHERE influencer_id = '{{ $('Profile Mapper').first().json.influencer_id }}'

INSERT INTO posts (id, influencer_id, post_url, post_type, caption, display_url, hashtags, group_buying_start, group_buying_end, product_name, group_buying_url, posted_at, updated_at, price, category)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.influencer_id }}',
  '{{ $json.post_url }}',
  '{{ $json.post_type }}',
  '{{ $json.caption }}',
  '{{ $json.display_url }}',
  '{{ $json.hashtags_pg }}',
  {{ $json.group_buying_start ? "'" + $json.group_buying_start + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.group_buying_end ? "'" + $json.group_buying_end + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.product_name ? "'" + $json.product_name + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.group_buying_url ? "'" + $json.group_buying_url + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.posted_at ? "'" + $json.posted_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.updated_at }}',
  {{ $json.price ? $json.price : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.category ? "'" + $json.category + "'" : 'NULL' }}
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
UPDATE influencer_suggestions SET status = 'completed' WHERE instagram_username = '{{ $('Loop Over Items').first().json.instagram_username }}' AND status = 'processing';
UPDATE influencer_suggestions SET status = 'completed' WHERE instagram_username = '{{ $('Loop Over Items').first().json.instagram_username }}' AND status = 'processing';
UPDATE influencer_suggestions SET status = 'completed' WHERE instagram_username = '{{ $('Loop Over Items').first().json.instagram_username }}' AND status = 'processing';
